name: Refinement

predicate: observable behavior still matches the captured baseline
the full test suite passes with no regressions
no public API or behavior change was introduced

G-behavior-preserved.description: Observable behavior still matches the captured baseline.

G-no-api-change.description: No public API or behavior change was introduced.

G-tests.description: Full suite passes with no regressions.

stopConditions: the current behavior to preserve is not captured as a baseline
the refinement would change observable behavior (then it is a feature or a bug fix, not a refinement)
the change is structurally significant and the architecture decision is undeclared
a gate's required decision is still pending (pending is not approved)
